Forward link function

g_link.Rd

Maps the mean (mu) to the linear predictor (eta) under a specified GLM family.

Usage

g_link(mu, family)

Arguments

mu

A numeric vector or matrix of mean values.

family

A string: "gaussian", "binomial", or "poisson".

Value

A numeric vector or matrix of linear predictors on the link scale.

See also

ginv_link

On this page
